questions.text: In mobile device support, what is the primary purpose of Laptop hardware/device replacement?

answers.text: Laptop hardware/device replacement refers to planning replacement of field-serviceable laptop components such as batteries, RAM, storage, keyboards, keys, and wireless cards while checking model compatibility, service documentation, and ESD safety.
Wireless cards, which is related to internal wireless networking adapter rather than general category covering replaceable laptop parts and safe service workflow.
Keyboard/keys, which is related to text/input hardware on a laptop rather than general category covering replaceable laptop parts and safe service workflow.
Battery, which is related to power source for mobile operation rather than general category covering replaceable laptop parts and safe service workflow.

explanations.a: Planning replacement of field-serviceable laptop components such as batteries, RAM, storage, keyboards, keys, and wireless cards while checking model compatibility, service documentation, and ESD safety. This is the correct answer.
explanations.b: Internal laptop adapters, often M.2 or mini PCIe, that provide WiFi and sometimes Bluetooth connectivity and require antenna leads to be attached correctly. Laptop hardware/device replacement is different because planning replacement of field-serviceable laptop components such as batteries, RAM, storage, keyboards, keys, and wireless cards while checking model compatibility, service documentation, and ESD safety.
explanations.c: Laptop input components that may be replaced as a full keyboard assembly or individual keycaps depending on model design and damage type. Laptop hardware/device replacement is different because planning replacement of field-serviceable laptop components such as batteries, RAM, storage, keyboards, keys, and wireless cards while checking model compatibility, service documentation, and ESD safety.
explanations.d: A removable or internal power pack that stores energy for mobile operation; replacement requires the correct form factor, connector, capacity rating, and safe handling of swollen or damaged cells. Laptop hardware/device replacement is different because planning replacement of field-serviceable laptop components such as batteries, RAM, storage, keyboards, keys, and wireless cards while checking model compatibility, service documentation, and ESD safety.
